adventure.title: Ambush Alley
adventure.introduction: A twisting market alley at dusk. Ahead you spot the cutpurse who lifted your coin purse an hour ago, loitering with two rough-looking companions — a hired thug and a frenzied howler. Your pack mule trails behind you. Confront the thief and take back what is yours.

atmosphere.setting: a shadowy back alley behind a market

market_alley.name: Market Alley
market_alley.description: A narrow alley behind the market stalls, strewn with crates and refuse. The cutpurse leans against a wall, flipping your stolen coin purse in one hand. A heavyset hired thug cracks his knuckles beside him, and a wild-eyed howler bounces on the balls of his feet, spoiling for a fight. Your pack mule waits patiently behind you. A dead-end court branches off to the east.

dead_end.name: Dead-End Court
dead_end.description: A walled-in court stacked with broken crates. No way out but back.

exits.direction: West back to the market alley

pack_mule.name: Pack Mule
pack_mule.description: A placid, sure-footed mule laden with your travelling gear. It follows you everywhere and will not fight — it just stands there, braying nervously when blades come out.

dialogue.guidelines: A beast of burden. It cannot speak; it brays, snorts, and stamps. It is docile and loyal.

cutpurse.name: Cutpurse
cutpurse.description: A wiry thief with quick fingers and a crooked grin — the one who stole your coin purse. If cornered, he whistles for his crew.

interactions.description: Confront and grab the cutpurse to take back your stolen purse.

result.narrative: You seize the cutpurse by the collar. He lets out a sharp, piercing whistle!
At the cutpurse's whistle, his crew piles in — the hired thug and the frenzied howler rush you from the shadows!

hired_thug.name: Hired Thug
hired_thug.description: A heavyset bruiser paid to break bones. He has orders and a grudge: he goes for you personally, no matter what.

frenzied_howler.name: Frenzied Howler
frenzied_howler.description: A wild-eyed knife-fighter who fights dirty. When bloodied (below half HP), he flies into a frenzy, attacking with twice his usual fury.

frenzy.name: Frenzy
frenzy.description: The howler flies into a shrieking frenzy, attacking with reckless fury for 2d4 slashing damage.
